_comment: Project-scoped Claude Code settings for the Hydra orchestrator repo (issue #692). The SessionStart hook captures every autopilot-/operator-dispatched subagent session into the subagent-dispatch registry (hydra:dispatches:subagent:*) by reading the hidden `<!-- hydra-dispatch v1 ... -->` sentinel from the session transcript's first user message and POSTing it to /api/dispatches/subagent. Sessions WITHOUT a sentinel (a human running `claude` directly) silently no-op, so registering this hook globally is safe. The hook path is absolute so the harness finds it regardless of the subagent's cwd. This is intentionally PROJECT-scoped (not ~/.claude/settings.json) per the issue contract.
